name: Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and green pepper to the pan. Cook until the onion is tender.
3. Stir in the cooked rice, mushrooms, and water chestnuts.
4. Pour in the soy sauce and cook for 8-10 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Push the mixture to one side of the pan and crack the eggs into the other side.
6. Scramble the eggs until set, then mix them with the rice mixture.
7. Cook for an additional 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. For variety, cook cubed pork, beef, or lamb through at the end.
